name: Centered
description: Centered card on a background. Used for auth flows (login, register, forgot password) across all archetypes.

guidance.max_width: Centered content should be constrained to max-width: 28rem (448px) for auth forms, 36rem (576px) for wider content.
guidance.vertical_centering: Center the content card vertically using min-height: 100dvh with flexbox centering.
